dimensions.evidence: Plan required language_tiers.go with Tier enum, registry, and TierForLanguage helper; diff instead adds KnownLanguages() to generic.go — a completely different (and partial) implementation that does not create any tier registry, enum, or the three specified tests.
Plan explicitly targeted internal/engine/language_tiers.go and _test.go; diff changes internal/discovery/generic.go and creates internal/discovery/generic_test.go — zero overlap with planned files.
Tests written for KnownLanguages() are genuine (sort, dedup, determinism, expected set); no test deletion, weakening, or hard-coded expected-value gaming observed.

The KnownLanguages() export and its tests are not harmful or regressive, but advancing this diff would merge code that fails to deliver the approved plan's tier-registry feature — a waste of operator review and a process hazard.

failureReasons: Build did not implement the approved plan: the plan called for internal/engine/language_tiers.go (Tier enum, registry map, TierForLanguage) and internal/engine/language_tiers_test.go (three tier-registry tests). The diff instead adds a KnownLanguages() helper in internal/discovery/generic.go with unrelated property tests. No tier registry, no enum, no tier test exists.
